description: CompositionYellow round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with graphic print on the frontWash care1. Wash dark colours separately2. Use mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees)3. Do not wring or bleach4. Flat dry in shade5. Do not iron on printFittingRegular FitBring out the trendy fashionista side of you with this yellow graphic tee from jealous 21. The graphic of the girl in the polka dot dress on the front is a tribute to the wonderful materialistic 50's. Team this t-shirt with black capris, peep toe heels and red nail varnish and lipstick for an outing with friends and look stylish all the way.Model's statistics1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-5.6", Chest-32"
